rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"For external npm packages (like @kody-ade/engine), verification is done by inspecting the installed CLI binary in node_modules, not by modifying source.","scope":"pipeline verification"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Chore tasks (read-only verification) have no build step and no source changes; the implementation is just writing verify.md with PASS/FAIL.","scope":"pipeline verification"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The compose skip-logic is gated on decomposeState.mergeOutcome === \"merged\" at line ~18312 in the compiled CLI binary.","scope":"@kody compose"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Phase 2 Verify + Review always run after a skipped merge, so retrying compose after failure always resumes from the verify stage.","scope":"@kody compose"}]}
